# RHEL 9 SSSD AD Integration Guide

This guide covers the steps required to join a RHEL 9 host to an Active
Directory domain via SSSD, including realm join, sssd.conf tuning, and
Kerberos ticket lifetime configuration.

## Prerequisites

- RHEL 9 host with network connectivity to AD DCs.
- Domain-join credentials.
- Time sync against AD DC time source.

## Steps

1. Install required packages: `sssd realmd adcli krb5-workstation`.
2. Run `realm discover example.com`.
3. Run `realm join example.com -U admin@EXAMPLE.COM`.
4. Edit `/etc/sssd/sssd.conf` for backup site, lifetime, and access filter.

## See also

- `man sssd-ad`
- `man realm`
- `man adcli`
